title: Node 24, TypeScript 7.0.2, TypeScript 6 API Compatibility, npm, and Reproducible Installs · Automation Case: Ci Npm Ci Lockfile Contract
summary: A TypeScript build uses floating Node and npm versions, npm install mutates the lockfile, lifecycle scripts gain network authority, and local generated files hide a clean-run failure. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ci npm ci lockfile contract increment in reproducible TypeScript build contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use npm ci with a committed matching lockfile and committed install flags while detecting lock drift and registry changes.

Align Node 24, npm 11 or later, the TypeScript 7.0.2 native CLI, the TypeScript 6.0.2 compatibility API required by current tooling, package metadata, engines, action runtime, and local developer versions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.code:
# Worked focus: ci-npm-ci-lockfile-contract — Use npm ci with a committed matching lockfile and committed install flags while detecting lock drift and registry changes.
  # Evidence: ci-worked-ci-node-typescript-reproducibility-5
  - competency: ci-worked-ci-node-typescript-reproducibility-5
    artifact: typescript-build.yaml
    decision: worked ci node typescript reproducibility 5
    environment: single-job ephemeral self-hosted runner in a segmented subnet
    fault-injection: expire the only retained test artifact during incident reconstruction
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: worked5
    change: |
      node: 24-lts
      npm: 11-or-later
      typescript-native: 7.0.2
      typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
      tsc: native-compiler
      api-tools: typescript6-alias
      setup-node: 7
      install: npm-ci-frozen-lock
      package-manager-cache: risk-reviewed
      workspace: clean-checkout
      build-output: content-digested
      changed-environment: cold-cache-and-locale
    verify: npm ci then run strict type test build and package checks from a clean supported Node 24 environment
    failure: Reject floating toolchains, npm install lock mutation, local residue, lifecycle-script trust, or one warm build as reproducibility.
    repair: Align tool versions, freeze installs, bound registry and scripts, build cleanly, digest output, and repeat changed environments.
